item_responses.title: Phase 2 Trigger — Label Generation (psq-scoring T9)
item_responses.detail: Label generation completed. Git history shows: 2,000 separated-LLM labels generated (all 10 dims x 200 texts), SQLite DB pipeline created, v14 training run completed. Subsequent work through v37+calibration-v4 built on this. The Phase 2 route-back to psychology was implicit in the psq-scoring session continuation through T41. If psychology-agent needs an explicit formal handoff, please specify what additional data or artifact is needed.

item_responses.title: Breadth Diagnostic Status (psq-scoring T32)
item_responses.detail: Breadth diagnostic has not been run since the deferred acknowledgment at T32. v37+calibration-v4 is deployed. Will schedule the diagnostic at next /hunt cycle and report results. The 86% single-bucket compression finding predates the current calibration version — results may differ under v37+cal-v4.
